purpose: Catch abstract systems, rooms, strategies, and conversations treated as intentional actors instead of naming concrete behavior.

emptyShift: something important was beginning to shift
selfEvaluation: what it was meant to be
becomingVerb: become what it was always becoming

rejectIf: sentence names a concrete actor, document, sensor, transcript, trademark, or measurement
sentence states an actual causal mechanism
positiveExamples: The room seemed to understand that something important was beginning to shift.
The strategy wanted to become more honest with itself.
The conversation held the team until the next layer of clarity arrived.
negativeExamples: The room sensor reported that occupancy increased after the doors opened.
The strategy document lists Mara as owner and May 31 as the review date.
notes: This expands abstract-personification without adding exact literal sentences.
The broad-pattern concrete guard rejects technical and documentary readings.
